arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Alaves 0-1 Real Madrid; 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Lucas Vazquez—6: Finished the match with 3 completed tackles and never really tested by Carlos Martin as nearly all of Alaves attacks came down the left. Finished the match with 5 completed dribbles, most of which came in the first half before the red card.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend shows support for Eduardo Camavinga after winning goal vs Alavés
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Marcelo has on Sunday moved to send a message of appreciation the way of current Blancos star Eduardo Camavinga. This comes after the Frenchman conjured up…

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey makes Real Madrid admission ahead of crucial moment in Gunners 'project'
arts.sum: Arsenal go to the Bernabeu holding onto a 3-0 lead from the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final, and Thomas Partey admits the game represents a crucial one in their modern history

arts.ttl: Arsenal star offers first insight into tactics for Real Madrid return leg
arts.sum: Gunners ready for ‘beautiful moment’ at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Real Madrid close gap on Barcelona with Alaves win as Kylian Mbappe sees red
arts.sum: Real are four points behind leaders Barca.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid scheduled for May 11
arts.sum: The potentially title-deciding Clásico between Barcelona and Real Madrid at the Olympic Stadium has been scheduled for May 11.

arts.ttl: What did the referee’s report say about Kylian Mbappé’s Real Madrid red card vs Alavés?
arts.sum: The referee’s report for the red card picked up by Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé on Sunday has been unveiled online. Frontman Mbappé is for his part of course fresh…

arts.ttl: Whether Kylian Mbappe can play against Arsenal after red card in Alaves 0-1 Real Madrid
“Clear” – Davide Ancelotti admits Kylian Mbappe red card was deserved
arts.sum: After back-to-back defeats against Valencia and Arsenal, it was important for Real Madrid to win at Alaves on Sunday – and they did so despite a Kylian Mbappe red card, with the only goal of the game at Mendizorroza coming from Eduardo Camavinga. Davide Ancelotti stood in for father Carlo, who was serving a touchline […] The post “Clear” – Davide Ancelotti admits Kylian Mbappe red card was deserved appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Alaves 0-1 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Kylian Mbappe sees red in narrow Los Blancos success
arts.sum: Real Madrid survive a first-half red card for Kylian Mbappe to record a 1-0 victory over Alaves in Sunday's La Liga contest.
